nameTarget.description: Value to use when configuring the Target property of the SRV record at the DNS host.

port.description: Value to use when configuring the port property of the SRV record at the DNS host.

priority.description: Value to use when configuring the priority property of the SRV record at the DNS host.

protocol.description: Value to use when configuring the protocol property of the SRV record at the DNS host.

service.description: Value to use when configuring the service property of the SRV record at the DNS host.

weight.description: Value to use when configuring the weight property of the SRV record at the DNS host.
